page.content: The first table presents the components and their respective values across two columns, with the headers labeled as Component, 1, and 2. The row labeled PRISM shows values of .907 in column 1 and −.247 in column 2. The TQ total score row has values of .865 in column 1 and −.206 in column 2. For the VAS (eyes closed) row, the values are .744 in column 1 and .532 in column 2. Tinnitus duration is represented with values of −.216 in column 1 and .917 in column 2. The Eigenvalues row lists values of 2.171 in column 1 and 1.229 in column 2.

page.content: Lastly, the % of variance row shows 55.336 in column 1 and 29.664 in column 2. The second table categorizes sectors with headers Sector, BCn (%), ONn (%), NSn (%), Nationaln (%), and Totaln (%). The PC sector has values of 10 (50.0) in BCn, 9 (47.4) in ONn, 10 (47.6) in NSn, 3 (21.4) in Nationaln, and 32 (43.2) in Totaln. The PH sector reports 10 (50.0) in BCn, 10 (52.6) in ONn, 10 (47.6) in NSn, 3 (21.4) in Nationaln, and 33 (44.6) in Totaln. The PC and PH sector shows 0 (0) in BCn and ONn, 1 (4.8) in NSn, 6 (42.9) in Nationaln, and 7 (9.5) in Totaln. The Neither sector has 0 (0) across BCn, ONn, NSn, and 2 (14.3) in Nationaln, totaling 2 (2.7) in Totaln. The TOTAL row summarizes 20 (100) in BCn, 19 (100) in ONn, 21 (100) in NSn, 14 (100) in Nationaln, and 74 (100) in Totaln.
